name: Placeholder cascade — a freely-placeable later row is NOT trapped behind unresolvable prereqs
description: The original cascade demonstration in M2 shape. The model has 5 rows: A and B are level-1 freely-placeable; C has a prereq (XYZ_NEVER) that is never satisfiable; D's prereq is C, also permanently blocked; E is level-1 with no prereqs and lower priority than C/D. The legacy planAlgorithm enters 'restricted mode' on D's prereq chain — that allow-list excludes E from every subsequent semester, so E silently never gets placed and slots fill with Student Elective placeholders. The Phase 6 IEPGeneratorService MUST place A, B, and E, and surface C and D as explicit unresolved slots. No silent placeholders, no trap.
